title: CEO Escalation Packet

A.label: Approve historical API + provide key
A.impact: Unlock PATH A historical backfill. CLV validation becomes possible after backfill completes.
A.unblock_condition: CEO approves + API key provided to Worker
A.worker_next_action: Run API key gate check (paper_only). No backfill until key validated.

B.label: Reject historical API, use forward-only
B.impact: PATH A stays closed. PATH B forward accumulation continues at current pace (0/200 pairs).
B.worker_next_action: Continue daily forward coverage read-only check. No crawler modification.

C.label: Continue defer, accept blocked state
C.impact: No change. Engineering team continues daily monitor only. P16 not allowed.
C.unblock_condition: CEO makes a decision (A or B)
C.worker_next_action: Daily monitor only. Report only. No new tasks.

worker_commitment: Worker will not advance P16 without explicit CEO decision.
annotation: paper_only=true。P15-E CEO Escalation Packet。不代替 CEO 選路。不宣稱任何策略具獲利能力。
